content: Typegoose: class-based decorator schema for Mongoose. @prop adds property to schema; infers type from TS metadata via emitDecoratorMetadata+reflect-metadata (legacy experimental decorators). @modelOptions configures schema options. Type inference is implicit from class property types when emitDecoratorMetadata is enabled. Since v12.11.0, array type inferred from [TYPE] annotation. Built on Mongoose, not a standalone driver wrapper — inherits Mongoose complexity. CRITICAL: TS5 standard decorators do NOT support emitDecoratorMetadata or parameter decorators; explicit type annotations in @prop({type:String}) required for standard decorator approach.
